# VaultOf50 - AI Search / LLM Crawler File

## Site Overview
VaultOf50 is a horror film archive covering 1950-2000. Every country. Every decade. Built by fans who take horror seriously.

## Site Structure

### Main Sections
- / — Home — Featured horror films from the archive
- /browse — Browse all horror films (1950-2000)
- /blog — Horror film essays and articles
- /threads — Deep dive series (Frankenstein, Dracula, The Mummy, Haunted House)
- /community — Community-written horror content
- /submit — Submit writing to the archive

### Blog Categories
- Genre Deep Dives — Analysis of horror subgenres
- Country Profiles — Horror films by country

### Thread Series
- Frankenstein — The monster across world cinema
- Dracula — The vampire across world cinema  
- The Mummy — Ancient horror across world cinema
- Haunted House — The house in horror cinema

### Example Blog Posts
- Italian Horror 1970s: Giallo
- UK Hammer Horror
- Japanese Horror 1950s-1999
- German Horror Expressionism
- American Horror: Blaxploitation

### Example Thread Parts
- Frankenstein: The Origin
- Dracula: Hammer Owns Dracula
- Haunted House: Japan Builds the Wrong House

## Content Type
Long-form essays, film analyses, deep dives into horror cinema history. All content is original writing.

## Contact
For inquiries: [contact email if available]
